mapper.select: select dept_id from sb_work_group_dept where group_id = #{groupId} and delete_time is null
mapper.update: update sb_work_group_dept set delete_by = #{deleteBy}, delete_time = sysdate() where group_id = #{groupId}
mapper.insert: insert into sb_work_group_dept (id, group_id, dept_id, customer_id, create_by, create_time) values (#{id}, #{groupId}, #{deptId}, #{customerId}, #{createBy}, sysdate())

insert into sb_work_group_dept (id, group_id, dept_id, customer_id, create_by, create_time) values
(#{item.id}, #{item.groupId}, #{item.deptId}, #{item.customerId}, #{item.createBy}, sysdate())
on duplicate key update delete_by = null, delete_time = null
